_about: Known-good values computed FROM money-canary.golden.json by the REAL shipped finance functions (app/modules/finance.js + finance-statements-v2.js) run against a fake MastDB. This is the shared cross-surface contract: the same figures the MCP finance_get_revenue / finance_get_pnl / finance_get_ar_aging / finance_get_tax_summary tools must return on the same data (their byte-shared cores). Regenerate by re-running test/money-canary.test.js after any intentional fixture change; the test FAILS until this manifest matches, by design. All monetary values are INTEGER CENTS. asOf 2026-06-22.

revenue._derivation: orders ao-o1(11953 dtc)+ao-o2(50000 dtc)+ao-o3(102000 in_person, totalCents preferred not 10.2M)+ao-o5(4500 in_person)+ao-o6(8000 mkt)+ao-o7(124000 wholesale) + sales ao-s2(12000 manual)+ao-s4(6500 in_person). EXCLUDED: ao-o4 cancelled, ao-o8 test (revenue filters test), ao-s1 POS-square mirror (orderId), ao-s3 voided.

pnl._derivation: cogs = materials expense ao-e1(40000, reviewed) + cogs-adjustment JE ao-j1(5000) + line items [ao-o1 cogsCents 3000, ao-o6 product-cost fallback 1500x2=3000, ao-o7 line1 cogsCents 4500x2=9000] = 60000. ao-o7 line2 (p-unknown, no cogsCents, no product cost) → cogsLineMissingCount 1 → marginReliable false → UI withholds. opex = software 4500 + shipping 5880 + booth_fee 5400 + payroll JE 30000 = 45780 (EXCLUDED: ao-e2 materials-not-reviewed, ao-e6 personal, ao-e7 not-reviewed, ao-j3 owner-draw).

tax._derivation: F5: ao-o1 OR taxCents 0 (kept — stated even at $0), ao-o2 WA 4250, ao-o7 WA 0 (→ WA orderCount 2), ao-o3 shippingState CA fallback + tax 8.50 dollars → 850 cents. STATELESS (surfaced in missingStateOrders, NOT bucketed): ao-o5, ao-o6, ao-o8. ao-o4 cancelled excluded entirely. Note: the tax loop does NOT filter test orders (ao-o8 counts toward missingState), unlike the revenue loop.

arAging._derivation: ao-wsinv-5 due 2026-07-12 (future) → current 54000. ao-ar2 due 2026-06-05 (17d) → 1_to_30 98000. ao-ar3 due 2026-05-08 (45d), partial-paid → due 161000-61000=100000 → 31_to_60. ao-ar4 due 2026-04-10 (73d) → 61_to_90 72000. ao-ar5 due 2026-01-15 (>90d) → 90_plus 45000. EXCLUDED: ao-ar6 paid-in-full (due 0), ao-ar7 test.
